commentaries.author: Aphrahat the Persian Sage
commentaries.content: Now we see that Tyre was inhabited and was opulent after it had “wandered seventy years,” and after it had received the reward of its prostitutions. - "Demonstration 21.6"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Commit. Septuagint, "be the emporium for all. "Great injustice prevailed formerly among merchants, so that it is represented as a dishonest calling. (Haydock)
